cards.name: Wolf
cards.abilityDescription: 20% chance to attack twice in one turn

cards.name: Eagle
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: randomly shuffles all enemy card positions

cards.name: Bear
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start, boosts entire team's ATK by 10%

cards.name: Mythical Wolf
cards.abilityDescription: Gains +15% ATK per other ally alive when entering battle

cards.name: Centaur
cards.abilityDescription: Deals bonus damage equal to 20% of enemy's missing HP

cards.name: Minotaur
cards.abilityDescription: The first time this card is hit: reduces all enemy ATK by 15% and gains 20% damage reduction for the rest of the battle

cards.name: Harvest Titan
cards.abilityDescription: Deals bonus damage equal to 12% of the enemy's MAX HP each attack

cards.name: Demon Imp
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: deals 50% ATK as damage to the current enemy and inflicts Burn (7% MAX HP per turn for 3 turns)

cards.name: Hellhound
cards.abilityDescription: Attacks twice per turn while the enemy is below 50% HP

cards.name: Cerberus
cards.abilityDescription: Attacks 3 times per turn — first hit full damage, second and third hits deal 25% ATK each

cards.name: Sproutling
cards.abilityDescription: Regenerates 7.5% max HP per turn, and every other turn gains +5% ATK permanently

cards.name: Flower Lord
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack: 75% chance to strike all enemies for 15% ATK and poison 2 random enemies. On death, all poison-related allies gain 25% of this card's damage.

cards.name: Flower Guardian
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: gives every ally a shield absorbing 20% of THIS card's HP, and each shielded ally deals +10% more damage on their first attack

cards.name: Snow Mage
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: reduces all enemies' ATK by 15% AND inflicts Permafrost (stuns each enemy on their 3rd turn)

cards.name: Snow Husk
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: spawns a snow domain for 5 turns. Each turn: deals 3% of this card's ATK to all enemies and reduces enemy ATK by 3% (compounding). This card gains the reduced ATK.

cards.name: Snow Beast
cards.abilityDescription: While alive on team: all allies take 20% less damage. When this card itself is attacked: 25% chance to stun the attacker

cards.name: Viking
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: +15% ATK for each enemy card with higher ATK than this one (counts ALL enemy cards, including ones not yet active)

cards.name: DeepSea Knight
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death, deals the exact damage of the killing blow back at the attacker

cards.name: Sea Serpent Cultist
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: pulls the weakest enemy card to the front position

cards.name: Cthulhu
cards.abilityDescription: While alive: every ally deals bonus damage equal to 10% of this card's ATK
